raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna fazzija: Tee
Wihlisteri pahr tew Simsans/
un wiꞥſch usinohdahs no fawa
Meega/ un fazzija: Es iſeefchu
fcho Brihdi/ ka zittkahrt/ un iſ-
rauſchohs/ jo wiꞥſch ne finnaja/
ka tas KUNGS no winna bija
atſtahjis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad faagrahbe winnu tee
Wihlisteri/ un iſduhre winna Az-
zis/ un nowedde to us Gasu un
fehje to ar diwi Warra Pinne-
klem/ un winnam tur bijjamalt
Zeetuma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet winna Galwas Mat-
ti fahze atkat isaugt/ ta patt/ ka
tee bij nods ihti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fapulzejahs to Wih-
isteru Leelt-Kungi/ farwam Dee-
wain Dagonami weenu leelu Up-
puri uppureht/ un lihgfmotees/ un
tee fazzija : Muhtu Deews irr
muhfu Eenaidneeku Simsanu
muhfas Rohkas nodewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta patt/ kad tee Laudis
winnu redſeja/ teize tee fawn Dee-
wu/ jo tee tazzija: Muhtu Deews
irr muhtu Eenaidneeku mum8
Rohka dewis/ kas muhtu Seini
irr pohtijs/un tik daudsno mums
irr nokawis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad winnu Sir̈ds lihg-
mojahs/ tad jazzija tee: Aizina-
jeet Simsanu / ka tas mum8
Smeeklus padarra/ tad aizinaja
tee Simsanu no Zeetuma Nam-
ma/ un wiꞥſch darrija Smeek-
lus winnu Preekcha / un tee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tikke winnu starp dtvi Stabbeem
ftahweht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Simsans us
to Puift/ kas winnu pee Rohkas
waddija / laid mann walca / un
lai es tohs Stabbustaustu/ us ko
tas Nams stiprinahts irr/ un pee
teemi atteetees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas Nams bija pil6
no Wihreem un Seewahn. Un
tur bija wiſti Wihlisteru Leeli-
Kungi/ un us to Juntu bija kah-
di trihstuhkſtoschi Wihri un See-
wag/ kas luhkoja/ ka Simsane
Smeeklus darrija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad peefauze Simsane
to KUNGS/ un fazzija: Kungs/
KUNGS/ peeminnt mannis/
luhdsans/ un stiprini/ luhdsans/
mann tiklat scho Reisi Ak Deews
ka es par mannahin abbejahn
Azzim weenkahrt warru at
reebtees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Simsans apkamp
tohs dtwi twddejus Stabbus/ u
ko tas Nams bija stiprinahts
un us ko tas turrejahs/ weenn a
fawn labbu Rohku/ un weenu a
fawn kreifu Rohku/ un Simsan
fazzija :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai manna Dwebfele mir
ar teem Wihlistereem/ un wiſc
tohzijahs ar Warru/ tad fritte ta
Nams us teem Leeleem-Kungeen
un us wiſteem Laudim/ kas ceke-
ta bija/un wairak Mixrou bija
ko wiꞥſch mirdams nokawe / n
ka/ ko wiꞥſch dsihws buhdains b
nokawis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nonahze winna Brah
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
